description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a green fuselage and two blue wings stacked vertically, each featuring roundel insignias. The nose is rounded and yellow, with a two-blade propeller at the front, also painted in green and yellow. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield visible. The tail section is yellow with a vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both simple in design. The landing gear consists of two large yellow wheels mounted on struts beneath the lower wing, and a small tail skid at the rear.
description: A green and yellow biplane with blue double wings, open cockpit, and fixed yellow landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round yellow nose, green propeller, and stacked blue wings with roundels.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the blue wings, roundels, and the green fuselage with yellow tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the yellow tail, tail skid, and the back of the blue wings.
description_view_3: Side view showing the green fuselage, open cockpit, yellow wheels, and the stacked wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and supported by struts; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing.
